docs.title: ADSNPP — Algorithmic Decision System for Nuclear Power Plants
docs.text:
Open-source platform for evidence-based nuclear reactor selection, integrating parallel Monte Carlo uncertainty quantification, AI/ML risk classification, blockchain governance, and circular economy frameworks for newcomer nuclear countries.

Presented at the IAEA Second Technical Meeting on Open-Source Software for Nuclear Engineering (ONCORE-26), EPFL Lausanne, July 20-24, 2026.

docs.title: API reference
docs.text:
Run the FastAPI gateway locally:

pip install -r requirements.txt
uvicorn adsnpp.api.gateway:create_app --factory --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload

Interactive docs are then served at http://localhost:8000/api/docs.

docs.title: Source
docs.text: See the GitHub repository for source code, tests, and the N-CEF circular economy scoring engine.
